---
title: "Mary Plowman"
---

## Mary Plowman

**Dates:** (b. 1829)

**Maiden name:** (Carter Smith)

### Description

sister of Ann Carter Smith

### Biography

She married (4 Feb 1862) Thomas Henry Plowman, eldest son of the late Henry Plowman of Dorchester. [<i>Gentleman's Magazine</i> 12 March 1862, 366]

### Letters

- Letter from April 3d 1862

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
